mapper.select: SELECT co.*, c.college_name, m.major_name FROM edu_course co LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON co.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN edu_major m ON co.major_id = m.id WHERE co.id = #{id}

SELECT ta.id, co.course_code, co.course_name, co.credits, co.hours, c.college_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_course_selection cs WHERE cs.teaching_assignment_id = ta.id) as selected_count FROM edu_teaching_assignment ta JOIN edu_course co ON ta.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON co.college_id = c.id WHERE ta.semester = #{semester} AND co.course_type IN ('PUBLIC_ELECTIVE', 'MAJOR_ELECTIVE') AND ta.status = 1 AND ta.id NOT IN ( SELECT teaching_assignment_id FROM edu_course_selection WHERE student_id = #{studentId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_course ( course_code, course_name, college_id, major_id, credits, hours, semester, course_type, exam_type, description, status ) VALUES ( #{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{collegeId}, #{majorId}, #{credits}, #{hours}, #{semester}, #{courseType}, #{examType}, #{description}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE edu_course
course_code = #{courseCode},
course_name = #{courseName},
college_id = #{collegeId},
major_id = #{majorId},
credits = #{credits},
hours = #{hours},
semester = #{semester},
course_type = #{courseType},
exam_type = #{examType},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
